repair_candidate.summary: Repair #64800 on the contributor branch or a replacement branch if branch repair fails: update wrapProviderStreamFn on current main so all matching provider hook implementations can contribute wrapStreamFn, while filtering unrelated providers and avoiding duplicate invocation of the primary matched provider. Preserve @klin3867 credit from source PR #64800.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(plugins): preserve hook-alias stream wrappers across providers
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repair `wrapProviderStreamFn` so matching provider and hookAlias plugins can chain `wrapStreamFn`
- keep unrelated providers out of the wrapper chain
- avoid invoking the matched provider wrapper twice

## Source credit
Carries forward the fix direction from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/64800 by @klin3867 with attribution preserved.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/provider-runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Credit @klin3867 as source PR author for #64800.
Replacement PR body should state that it carries forward the source PR's provider hook-alias stream-wrapper fix and attribution.
